---
pagetitle: "About Me"
---

<div class="page-hero">

<p class="hero-label">About Me</p>

<h1>Professional Introduction</h1>

<h2>Applied Business Analytics student with a project management background</h2>

<p>
My name is Lutong Wen, and I am currently pursuing a Master of Science in Applied Business Analytics at Boston University Metropolitan College. I also completed a Master of Science in Project Management at Boston University MET.
</p>

<p>
My academic and professional interests focus on business analytics, marketing analytics, data visualization, cloud computing, and project management. I am especially interested in using data to support business decisions, improve customer understanding, and communicate insights clearly.
</p>

</div>

## Academic and Career Interests

<div class="card-grid">

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Business Analytics</h3>
<p>I am interested in using data to identify patterns, evaluate business problems, and support practical decision-making.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Marketing and Web Analytics</h3>
<p>My coursework has helped me analyze customer behavior, campaign performance, A/B testing results, and digital engagement.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Cloud and Technical Skills</h3>
<p>I have practiced using tools such as Python, SQL, Tableau, GitHub, Quarto, and AWS through academic projects and labs.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>Project Management</h3>
<p>My project management background helps me organize work, communicate clearly, understand stakeholder needs, and connect analysis to business value.</p>
</div>

</div>

## Personal Brand

<div class="wide-card">
<p>
My portfolio reflects two connected areas: analytics and project management. I want my work to show that I can not only analyze data, but also organize tasks, explain results, and connect findings to real business needs.
</p>
</div>
